title: デビュー戦の後に・バクシンスタート！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a successful debut race, Sakura Bakushin O
is full of confidence. Following that high, she's all
hyped up to run in G1 races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But with no real victories under her belt, running
a G1 race would be near impossible! Wanting to
assess her short distance skills, I suggest the Keio
Hai Junior Stakes instead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O seems reluctant, but I argue
that having the spectators gradually come around
to witnessing her speed would be good. Fully won
over, her motivation does a one-eighty.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O's next goal is now the Keio Hai
Junior Stakes.
